items.plot: In this animated musical, a girl builds a rocket ship and blasts off, hoping to meet a mythical moon goddess.

items.plot: A young opera singer on the cusp of stardom is hounded by a psychopath with a connection to her past, who forces her to watch as he brutally murders her friends and colleagues.

items.title: Onward
items.plot: Teenage elf brothers Ian and Barley embark on a magical quest to spend one more day with their late father. Like any good adventure, their journey is filled with cryptic maps, impossible obstacles and unimaginable discoveries.
